headline: FIBRA Prologis Acquires 590,000 Square Feet in the Mexico City Market
summary: FIBRA Prologis (BMV: FIBRAPL14), a leading owner and operator of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, has acquired a building from Prologis located in the Toluca submarket of Greater Mexico City, for an aggregate purchase price of US$94 million, including closing costs. The building is 100% leased in dollars to a global e-commerce player.

headline: O vs. PLD: Which REIT Looks Like the Better Buy for 2026?
summary: Realty Income offers steady monthly net-lease income, while Prologis leans on record leasing, development value creation and data center/energy growth.

headline: Prologis Ventures Backs TMV Logistics To Broaden Supply Chain Reach
summary: Prologis Ventures, the investment arm of Prologis (NYSE:PLD), is investing in TMV Logistics, a new US$200 million venture fund. TMV Logistics is focused on maritime, shipbuilding, and logistics infrastructure technology. Prologis Ventures is serving as a co anchor investor in the launch of the fund. For a company best known for logistics real estate, NYSE:PLD is now stepping further into the technology and infrastructure side of supply chains. TMV Logistics is directing its capital toward...
